title: stipa clausa subsp. matritensis
intro: Stipa clausa subsp. matritensis, also known as Spanish needle grass, is a type of grass native to the Canary Islands and North Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Spanish needle grass can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for a variety of health concerns.
